summary: 过去 24 小时 AI 新闻按技术、模型、商业、投资、安全与监管聚合。页面优先展示影响力高、来源清晰、并且能解释后续产业意义的信号。

keylines.title: 投资是今日主轴
keylines.text: 过去 24 小时里，投资相关内容占比最高，说明媒体报道和社交讨论正在向这一方向集中。

keylines.title: Grok / xAI带动 X 讨论
keylines.text: X 热点更偏实时体验和争议观点，适合用来捕捉模型、产品和安全事件的早期信号。

keylines.title: 基础设施仍是深层变量
keylines.text: 芯片、数据中心、电力和推理成本会持续决定 AI 产品能否从发布会走向规模化商业。

stories.title: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
stories.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics.
stories.analysis: 芯片、模型套件和 Agent 编排框架一起出现时，重点不是单点性能，而是端到端推理成本、部署效率和生态绑定。

stories.title: The agent evaluation gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a reality-alignment problem, not a coverage problem — and most are shipping to production anyway
stories.summary: Across 157 enterprises, organizations are granting AI agents more autonomy while trusting the evaluations meant to gate that autonomy less.
stories.analysis: 高管变动会影响 OpenAI 在 AGI、消费产品和商业化之间的资源分配，短期要看继任安排和关键团队稳定性。

stories.title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
stories.summary: Across 107 enterprises, AI agents are being given real access to systems and data while the controls meant to contain them lag behind.
stories.analysis: 这类观点把 AGI 路线之争重新拉回训练数据和世界模型问题：只扩大文本模型，未必能补足物理世界经验。

stories.title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
stories.summary: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: The AI context gap: Enterprise AI organizations have a trust problem, not a retrieval problem — and most are still building the fix
stories.summary: Across 101 enterprises, the infrastructure that feeds AI agents their business context is being built faster than it can be trusted.
stories.analysis: 语音模型的体验差距会体现在延迟、自然停顿、噪声环境和多轮上下文保持，而不是单句生成质量。

stories.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
stories.summary: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the n...
stories.analysis: 资本与基础设施信号要和现金流、电力、算力利用率一起看，热度本身不等于可持续商业回报。

stories.title: Google Vids now lets you star in your own AI videos
stories.summary: Google is adding personalized AI avatars to Vids that let users create videos starring a digital version of themselves, alongside Gemini Omni-powered tools for generating and editing videos from prompts and reference images.
stories.analysis: 消费级影像产品正在把生成式 AI 做成低门槛编辑能力，真正考验的是效果稳定性、版权边界和用户是否高频使用。

stories.title: Connect more of your apps to Search
stories.summary: You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于技术路线信号，后续重点是可复现性、工程成本和是否能被开源或商业系统快速吸收。

stories.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
stories.summary: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.
stories.analysis: 消费级影像产品正在把生成式 AI 做成低门槛编辑能力，真正考验的是效果稳定性、版权边界和用户是否高频使用。

stories.title: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
stories.summary: New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself.
stories.analysis: 政府、国安和监管相关内容会影响模型公司的销售边界、合规成本和跨境可用性。

stories.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game-creation feature in its mobile app
stories.summary: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.
stories.analysis: 这条新闻属于算力供应链信号，后续重点是训练/推理成本、供给稳定性和生态兼容性。

stories.title: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
stories.summary: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

stories.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
stories.summary: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents in...
stories.analysis: AI 编程工具竞争正在进入大型迁移和多步骤修复场景，差异会体现在代码库理解、权限控制和可审计输出。

stories.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
stories.summary: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.
stories.analysis: 模型新闻需要结合价格、延迟、上下文、工具调用和真实任务稳定性评估，单一榜单不足以判断产品竞争力。

xTrends.signal: 模型能力、价格和开发者可用性是主要讨论点，很多帖子直接拿它和 OpenAI、Anthropic 对比。
讨论集中在新模型分层、企业访问节奏、推理质量和产品体验是否有实质提升。
安全研究者和 CISO 圈层关注 AI Agent 是否会把攻击链自动化到新的速度。
投资者讨论长期数据中心租约、电力容量和 AI 基建股是否进入过热区间。
手机厂商把 AI 拉回端侧入口之争，争议点是功能是否真能改变日常使用。
创作者圈层继续测试视频生成、图像模型和工作流自动化，版权与真实性问题伴随升温。

briefings.title: 从热度看真实优先级
briefings.text: 模型发布仍最容易引爆讨论，但企业最终会按稳定性、成本、权限集成和数据安全来选择供应商。

briefings.title: 安全议题需要持续监测
briefings.text: 即使今天没有重大安全事件，Agent 普及也会放大身份权限和数据访问风险。

briefings.title: 资本开支影响模型竞争
briefings.text: 算力合同、芯片供应和数据中心成本正在成为 AI 公司竞争力的一部分。

watchlist: OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、NVIDIA 是否发布新的 API、价格或企业访问策略
X 高热讨论是否被主流媒体确认，还是停留在圈层争议
AI 数据中心和芯片供应是否出现新的融资、电力或交付约束
监管机构是否把 AI 安全、版权、金融建议或出口限制推进到执法层面
